title: Superrepo CICD fixes across workflows
body:
Cross-cutting GitHub Actions and workflow fixes on the superrepo after web_common extraction and nexus registration.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`5777116`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/5777116)
- **Subject:** CICD fixes
- **Completed:** 2026-05-26

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `repo-cicd`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-cicd-realized`

## What shipped

Cross-cutting GitHub Actions and workflow fixes on the superrepo after web_common extraction and nexus registration.
